subject: [PATCH nfs-utils 10/17] exportd/mountd: add netlink support for the auth.unix.gid cache

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified potential issues with the patch's use of getpwuid() and getgrouplist(), suggesting alternative approaches to improve performance. Requested further discussion on these points.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series adds netlink support for the auth.unix.gid cache in the NFS-utils exportd and mountd components. The goal is to improve performance by reducing the number of getpwuid() and getgrouplist() calls. The patch introduces a new handler that resolves UIDs to group lists using netlink messages.
